Claude Code HUGE Update: How to Use New Scheduled Tasks Feature

Discover how the latest Claude Code desktop update allows you to schedule recurring tasks and automate your workflow in the background. This guide covers everything from basic setup and browser integration to high-level use cases for business growth and coding.

00:00 - Intro: Claude Code's Game-Changing Update
00:46 - Setting Up Your First Scheduled Task
02:07 - Automating Browser Tasks with Extensions
02:40 - Top Use Cases for Automation
05:44 - Claude Code vs. OpenClaude
06:33 - Managing, Editing, and Running Tasks
09:13 - Permissions and Session History Guide
10:23 - Final Thoughts & Community Resources

chapters.title: Setting Up Your First Scheduled Task
